description: A season ticket holder wants to renew their tickets for the upcoming season but wishes to move to a different seat.

nodes.task_description: Identify the fan's account and their current seat location.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the fan's account details and seat information.

nodes.task_description: Display a map of available seats for season ticket holders.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent shows the fan a real-time map of all unrenewed and available seats.

nodes.task_description: Process the seat change and the renewal payment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the fan's seat location for the new season and processes the payment.
